SYMBOL: POLICYBZR SCRIP CODE: 543390
Sub.: _Intimation of cancellation of Board Meetin;

Dear Sir/Madam,

In furtherance to our intimation dated February 02, 2026 and pursuant to Regulation 29 of SEBI
(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform you that the
‘meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company, which was scheduled to be held today, February
05, 2026, to discuss potential Qualified Institutions Placement (QIP) has been cancelled,

‘The abovesaid intimation will also be hosted on the website of the Company at www.pbfintech.in.
